meta.description: Slack에서 @멘션 메시지와 장애 알람 봇 메시지를 처리합니다. 일반 질문, 명령어(/health 등), MR 리뷰 요청, 장애 알람을 분류하여 적절한 핸들러로 라우팅합니다.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Webhook').item.json.body.text, channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, text: $json.response || '명령어 처리 중 오류가 발생했습니다.', threadTs: $('Webhook').item.json.body.threadTs || $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp, emoji: 'hourglass_flowing_sand', remove: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp, emoji: 'hourglass_flowing_sand', remove: true }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp, emoji: 'white_check_mark', remove: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, text: '❌ MR 리뷰 실패: ' + $json.error, threadTs: $('Webhook').item.json.body.threadTs || $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp, emoji: 'hourglass_flowing_sand', remove: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, threadTs: $('Webhook').item.json.body.threadTs || $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp, limit: 20 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: $json.text, maxTurns: 50, conversationHistory: $json.conversationHistory, channel: $json.channel, threadTs: $json.threadTs, userId: $json.user, source: 'slack' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp, emoji: 'hourglass_flowing_sand', remove: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, text: ($('Execute Claude').item.json.projectId ? '📁 [' + $('Execute Claude').item.json.projectId + '] ' : '') + ($('Execute Claude').item.json.routedAgent ? '🤖 [' + $('Execute Claude').item.json.routedAgent + ']\n' : '') + ($('Execute Claude').item.json.result || $('Execute Claude').item.json.error || '응답이 없습니다.'), threadTs: $('Webhook').item.json.body.threadTs || $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, text: '❌ 오류가 발생했습니다: ' + ($('Execute Claude').item.json.error || 'Unknown error'), threadTs: $('Webhook').item.json.body.threadTs || $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ replyTs: $('Send Reply').item.json.timestamp }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp, emoji: 'white_check_mark', remove: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Webhook').item.json.body.timestamp, emoji: 'x', remove: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Send Reply').item.json.timestamp, emoji: 'thumbsup', remove: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('Webhook').item.json.body.channel, timestamp: $('Send Reply').item.json.timestamp, emoji: 'thumbsdown', remove: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messages: [{ role: 'user', content: '다음 장애 알람 메시지를 분석해주세요:

## 프로젝트 정보
- 프로젝트: ' + ($json.projectName || 'Unknown') + ' (' + ($json.projectId || 'unknown') + ')
- Jira 프로젝트: ' + ($json.jiraProject || 'PROJ') + '

## 알람 메시지
```
' + $json.text + '
```

다음 JSON 형식으로만 응답해주세요:
```json
{
  "isActionable": true/false,
  "severity": "CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW",
  "summary": "Jira 이슈 제목 (50자 이내)",
  "description": "상세 설명",
  "suggestedFix": "수정 제안 (있으면)",
  "errorType": "에러 타입 (Kafka, NullPointer, Timeout 등)"
}
```' }], model: 'haiku', source: 'alert', maxTurns: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $json.channel, thread_ts: $json.threadTs, text: ':rotating_light: *장애 알람 분석 완료*

*심각도:* ' + ($json.severity || 'UNKNOWN') + '
*프로젝트:* ' + ($json.projectName || 'Unknown') + ' (`' + ($json.projectId || 'unknown') + '`)
*Jira:* ' + ($json.jiraProject || 'N/A') + '
*에러 타입:* ' + ($json.errorType || '분석 중') + '

*제목:* ' + ($json.summary || '알람 분석 결과') + '

*설명:*
' + ($json.description || '상세 내용 없음') + '

' + ($json.suggestedFix ? '*수정 제안:*
' + $json.suggestedFix : '') + '

---
:ticket: Jira 이슈 생성 → :ticket: 리액션 추가
:rocket: 자동 수정 시작 → :hammer_and_wrench: 리액션 추가' }) }}
